zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Lacy Baron of Pontefract and Lord of Blackburnshire於1097年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾朋特福拉可特時，他的父親Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract27歲，母親Mathilde de Perche22歲。他於大約1124年與Aubreye de Vesci在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1177年享年80歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Lacy Baron of Pontefract and Lord of Blackburnshire was born in 1097, in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract, was 27 and his mother, Mathilde de Perche, was 22. He married Aubreye de Vesci about 1124, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1177, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Lacy Baron of Pontefract and Lord of Blackburnshire est né en 1097, à Pontefract, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Perche, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Aubreye de Vesci environ 1124, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1177, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Lacy Baron of Pontefract and Lord of Blackburnshire 1097 in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract 27 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Perche 22. Er hat um 1124 in England Aubreye de Vesci geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1177 im Alter von 80 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Lacy Baron of Pontefract and Lord of Blackburnshire è nato il nel 1097 nel Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Perche, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Aubreye de Vesci circa 1124, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1177, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Lacy Baron of Pontefract and Lord of Blackburnshireが1097年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアポンテフラクトで生まれた時，父Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefractは27歳，母Mathilde de Percheは22歳であった。約1124年にイギリスでAubreye de Vesciと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1177年に80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Lacy Baron of Pontefract and Lord of Blackburnshire(이)가 1097년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 폰테프라크트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Perche(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1124년 영국에서 Aubreye de Vesci(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1177년 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Lacy Baron of Pontefract and Lord of Blackburnshire nasceu em 1097, em Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Perche, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Aubreye de Vesci aproximadamente 1124, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1177, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Lacy Baron of Pontefract and Lord of Blackburnshire родился в 1097 г. в местности понтефракт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Lacy Baron of Pontefract было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Perche, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Aubreye de Vesci около 1124 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1177 г. в возрасте 80 лет.

Se casó con Aubreye de Vesci aproximadamente 1124, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1177, a la edad de 80 años.
